title: Application Developer Intern (Jun-Dec'26)
description:
About ITLink Business Solutions

ITLink Business Solutions is an award-winning Singapore-based tech consultancy, renowned for its innovative approach to transforming businesses with tailored, enterprise-grade data and financial performance solutions, specifically leveraging IBM Planning Analytics and Microsoft Power BI. We empower our clients to make informed business decisions based on dependable data insights, driving tangible business outcomes. Embark on a dynamic internship with us and gain invaluable hands-on experience in the exciting journey of tech-driven business transformation.

Role Overview

As an Application Developer Intern at ITLink, you will contribute directly to the development and implementation of Business Intelligence and Corporate Performance Management solutions for our clients. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain practical experience with leading enterprise technologies (IBM Planning Analytics and Microsoft Power BI) and contribute to real-world projects. You'll work alongside our experienced team, receive direct mentorship, and play a supporting role in delivering data-driven insights that help businesses succeed.

What You'll Learn & Do

  • Support Solution Development: Assist Solution Architects and Developers in designing, coding, and implementing components of IBM TM1 and Microsoft Power BI solutions.
  • Data Integration Assistance: Support efforts in connecting to various data sources and transforming data for use in BI dashboards and financial models.
  • Problem-Solving & Testing: Participate in identifying and troubleshooting technical issues within applications, and assist in conducting system testing to ensure solution quality and reliability.
  • Requirements Support: Help gather, document, and analyze business requirements for new features or enhancements.
  • Documentation & Training Aid: Support the creation of technical documentation and user guides, and assist in preparing training materials for end-users.
  • Project Administration: Assist Project Managers with tracking project progress, preparing reports, and other administrative tasks to ensure smooth project execution.
  • Technology Exploration: Gain exposure to our proprietary tools like Omni and TMVGate, and learn about the strategic shift towards productized services and future SaaS concepts.
  • Continuous Learning: Actively engage in learning new technical skills and concepts related to data analytics, financial planning, and specific software solutions.

What We're Looking For (Requirements)

  • Education: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, Business Analytics, or a closely related quantitative discipline.
  • Analytical Aptitude: Strong analytical abilities with a keen interest in problem-solving and understanding complex data.
  • Foundational Technical Interest: Basic understanding of programming concepts or database principles (e.g., SQL) is a plus. A genuine curiosity about Business Intelligence tools, data modeling, or financial software is highly valued.
  • Eagerness to Learn: A strong willingness and enthusiasm to learn new, specialized technologies rapidly, particularly IBM Planning Analytics and Microsoft Power BI.
  • Proactive & Organized: Self-motivated, with good organizational skills and the ability to manage tasks effectively under guidance.
  • Team Player: Able to collaborate effectively within a team, taking direction and contributing positively to group efforts.

Why Intern with ITLink?

  • Specialized Hands-on Experience: Gain practical, sought-after skills in enterprise-grade technologies (IBM Planning Analytics and Microsoft Power BI) that are highly valued in the industry.
  • Direct Mentorship: Learn directly from experienced Solution Architects and our Managing Director, benefiting from their expertise and guidance on real-world projects.
  • Real-World Impact: Contribute to projects that directly help businesses make better decisions through data, offering a unique opportunity to see the impact of your work.
  • Dynamic Learning Environment: Work in a supportive and collaborative setting where your contributions are valued, and continuous learning is encouraged.
  • Pathway to Career: A successful internship can serve as a strong foundation for future career opportunities in data analytics, BI consulting, or software development.

Ready to Make an Impact?

If you are a motivated university student eager to gain practical experience, learn cutting-edge technologies, and contribute to meaningful projects, we encourage you to apply.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
